snippet.title: Missamma || Episode 1 || Vaishnavi Chaitanya || Arjun Kalyan || Infinitum Media
snippet.description:
From the creators of #softwaredevloveper comes a story of innocence, gumption and redemption. Follow and enjoy the journey of "Mahalakshmi" as she traverses through life's emotions with grit and panache. 


"Missamma" is a Telugu  Web Series Featuring Vaishnavi Chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan & Avinash Reddy Anam

Cast:- Vaishnavi chaitanya, Arjun Kalyan , Avinash Reddy Anam,  Kavya & Mounica .

Directed by Venkat Rdy ( Naani )

Written - Prashanth Babu Ragathi

Editing & D.I :- Raj Krish

Cinematography  - Bhanu Prakash Musmuri

Sound engineer - Vamshi Vinod Nalli ( Nani )

Title and publicity designer - Nikhil Concepts

Poster Design :-  Design Manchu

Title Animation :- Konte Pavan kumar 

Executive producer - Sri Vidya P

Music - Srujan Shashanka

Producer : Infinitum Media

#VaishnaviChaitanya is known for her music videos and cover songs and for acting in the Blockbuster Movie "Ala Vaikunta Puram Lo".

" Vaishnavi Chaitanya is a Telugu comedy & Entertainment Youtube Content Creator &  Actor at Telugu Film Industry.

This is produced by Infinitum media.

#Missamma

snippet.title: BIG MOMENT | RAHUL GANDHI Join In Village Cooking | Mushroom Biryani | Village Cooking Channel
snippet.description:
Today we have a Big Moment. Rahul Gandhi Joining our cooking and he encouraged us a lot. 

Today we cook mushroom biryani recipe by using traditional and healthy ingredients. Rahul Gandhi Enjoying mushroom biryani by eating with us. We never forget this big moment in our life. Thank you so much Rahul sir for this great opportunity.

snippet.title: Ghost Scenario | Promo Video | Jump Cuts 2.0 | Hari & Naresh
snippet.description:
Have you had a savage ghost moment? Jump Cuts presents a promo video of “Ghost Scenario.” 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. Later, he gets a call from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario.” Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #Promo #Jumpcuts

___________________________________

Cast : Hari Baskar
Directed by : Naresh Dillibabu
Music : Surya Srini
Cinematography : Jerin Auxilium
Editor : Vignesh Chakkaravarthy 
DI : Vishal 
Production Manager : Hari Prasad 
Team : Karthik & Vignesh 
Media partner : Divo 

___________________________________

We are here to entertain and if you like us, do share, like and subscribe

snippet.title: Rogue Queen Takes It All (Clash Of Clans Season Challenges)
snippet.description:
It's an all new season of Season Challenges and Gold Pass full of exciting tasks, rewards, and perks! The all new Rogue Queen Hero Skin awaits you! 


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ►https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ►https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

snippet.title: വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീനിൽ അലക്കിയ വസ്ത്രങ്ങൾ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർ ഈ രോഗങ്ങൾ പിടിപെടാതിരിക്കാൻ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കണം. ഷെയർ
snippet.description:
തിരക്കേറിയ നമ്മുടെ ജീവിതത്തിനിടയിൽ വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീൻ ഇന്ന് ഒഴിവാക്കാനാകില്ല. പക്ഷെ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട ഒരു കാര്യം.. പതിവായി വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീനിൽ അലക്കിയ വസ്ത്രങ്ങൾ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നവർക്ക് ചില രോഗങ്ങൾ പിടിപെടാൻ സാധ്യതയുണ്ട്. ഈ അവസ്ഥ ഉണ്ടാകുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ ?
0:00 Start
2:20  രോഗങ്ങൾ പിടിപെടുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ?
6:00 അടിവസ്ത്രം പകര്‍ച്ചവ്യാദിക്ക് കാരണമാകുന്നത് എങ്ങനെ ?
7:37 വാഷിംഗ് മെഷീന്‍ എങ്ങനെ  അണുവിമുക്തമാക്കാം ?

 ഈ രോഗങ്ങളെ എങ്ങനെ തടയാൻ സാധിക്കും ? വളരെ പ്രധാനപ്പെട്ട ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ. നിങ്ങൾ പൊതുസമൂഹത്തിന്റെ അറിവിലേക്കായി ഷെയർ ചെയ്യുക.. ഒരുപാടു കുടുംബങ്ങൾക്ക് ഈ അറിവ് ഉപകാരപ്പെടും. 

For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: तिल चौथ व्रत कथा | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat chaturthi | Sankashti Chaturthi Ki katha
snippet.description:
This Video shows two stories of Til Chauth vrat or . Til Chauth is also called Sankashti Chaturthi, Sakat Chauth, Sankat Chaturthi. Til Chauth vrat is observed on the Chaturthi of Krishna Paksha of Magh maas. Til Kutte is offered to Shri Ganesh Ji and Chauth Mata on the day of sakat choth.   Tilakuta is made by crushing sesame and jaggery together.
Women observe this fast for the longevity and success of their husband and son. This fast destroys all kinds of crises and provides happiness and prosperity.
On this day of Sakat chauth, women keep a fast for the whole day and worship Lord Ganesha and Chauth Mata in the evening. On observing the moon at night, the fast is completed. Let's watch the  Til Chauth Vrat Katha and pray to lord ganesh and sakata mata.

तिल चौथ व्रत कथा | Til Chauth Vrat Katha | Sankat Chauth Katha
आज मैं आप सभी के समक्ष तिल चौथ अथवा  संकट चौथ व्रत की  दो कथाएं  प्रस्तुत कर रही हूं। तिल चौथ का व्रत माघ मास की कृष्ण पक्ष की चतुर्थी को किया जाता हैं| इस दिन श्री गणेश जी व चौथ माता  को तिल कुट्टे का भोग लगाया जाता हैं |  तिलकुटा  तिल और गुड़ को  एक साथ कूटकर बनाया जाता है।
यह व्रत स्त्रिया अपने पति व पुत्र की दीर्घायु और सफलता के लिए करती हैं |  यह व्रत सभी प्रकार के संकटों  का नाश करता है और सुख समृद्धि प्रदान करता है।
इस दिन स्त्रिया  पूरा दिन व्रत रख कर शाम को गणेश जी व चौथ माता का पूजन  पूजन  करती हैं।  रात को चन्द्रमा को अर्ध्य  देने  पर व्रत पूर्ण हो जाता है। आइए शुरू करते हैं तिल चौथ की पहली कथा...

#tilchauthvratkatha  #sankatChauthVratKatha #ganesh  #chauthmata

snippet.title: પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીએ ભાઈ નરેન્દ્ર મોદી અને અમિતશાહ વિશે શું કહ્યું? BBC Interview
snippet.description:
#gujarat #localbodyelection #narendramodi 

ગુજરાતમાં સ્થાનિક સ્વરાજની ચૂંટણીને લઈને તમામ પક્ષોએ તૈયારી શરૂ કરી દીધી છે. 

નરેન્દ્ર મોદીના ભાઈ પ્રહ્લાદ મોદીના પુત્રી સોનલ મોદી આ ચૂંટણીમાં ઉમેદવારી નોંધાવી રહ્યા છે. 

બીબીસી સંવાદદાતા તેજસ વૈદ્યએ પ્રહ્લાદભાઈ સાથે વાત કરી. 

વીડિયો : ઉત્સવ ગજ્જર 

તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો :

kamare fatte

snippet.title: ही एक ग्रेवी बनवुन ठेवा आणि हवं तेव्हा हॉटेलसारखी कोणतीही डिश फक्त 10 मिनिटात बनवा/All purpose gravy
snippet.description:
In this video I will share recipe of restaurant style all purpose gravy, using this gravy you can make many dishes within 10-15 mins and tastes awesome.

या विडियो मध्ये आपण पाहणार आहोत हॉटेल मध्ये वापरली जाणारी ग्रेवी जी वापरून बर्‍याच प्रकारच्या डिश आपण 10-15 मिनिटात बनवू शकतो.. 

Ingredients / साहित्य ( 4 restaurant style dishes / 4 डिश साठी) 

Tomato / टोमॅटो 500gms 
Onion / कांदे 500gms 
Ginger / आले 50gms
Garlic / लसुण 50gms
Pumpkin seeds / मगज बी 50gms
Cadhew / काजू 25-30
Oil / तेल 6-7 tbsp
Bay leaf / तमालपत्र 4-5
Cinnamon / दालचिनी 2 inch
Black cardamom / मसाला वेलची 1
Green cardamom / हिरव्या वेलची 6-7
Cloves / लवंगा 7-8
Cumin seeds / जीरे 1 tbsp
Salt / मीठ 
Corriender powder / धणे पूड 2 tsp
Sugar / साखर 2 tsp
Red chilly powder / लाल मिरची पावडर 1&1/2 tsp
Turmeric / हळद 1 tsp

#allpurposegravy
#hotelsarkhigravy
#ग्रेवीएकसब्जियांअनेक
#ग्रेवीएकभाज्याअनेक 
#gravyeksabjiyaanek
#allpurposegravy
#testaurantstylegravy
#saritaskitchen

snippet.title: OMG see what i found in my bag !! **Warning | Anishka Khantwaal |
snippet.description:
Hello everyone! Here I am with yet another video for you all i.e. "What's in my bag?!".
Everyone asks me about things I carry in my bag all the time. So finally, here I am disclosing all the stuff my bag carries for me when I am out.

You may find tissues, masks, bills, and many more things. So do watch to find out similarities in your bags and mine!
.
.
.
.

Last video link:
https://youtu.be/6njj7nzfXgY

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/anishka_khantwaal18?igshid=8gsft90m3y3e

snippet.title: നാളെ മുതൽ വാഹനങ്ങൾ പിടിച്ചെടുക്കും ലൈസൻസ് റദ്ദാക്കും പ്രധാന അറിയിപ്പ്
snippet.description:
നാളെ മുതൽ വാഹനങ്ങൾ പിടിച്ചെടുക്കും ലൈസൻസ് റദ്ദാക്കും പ്രധാന അറിയിപ്പ് 
𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫📢📢📢
ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങൾ  പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയ,സാമുദായിക, മതപരമായ  ഒരു വേർതിരിവുമില്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് സ്കീമുകൾ ഏത് നിമിഷവും എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം സംഭവിക്കാം . ആയതിനാൽ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്‌ഡേഷനുകൾ കാണുവാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക👍.

#chrishalmedia

For more latest news and informative updates..

https://www.youtube.com/c/chrishalmedia

𝑪𝒉𝒆𝒄𝒌 𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒎𝒚 𝒑𝒓𝒐𝒇𝒊𝒍𝒆 𝒐𝒏 𝑫𝒂𝒊𝒍𝒚𝒉𝒖𝒏𝒕

snippet.title: Highlights - ATK Mohun Bagan 3-2 Kerala Blasters - Match 78 | Hero ISL 2020-21
snippet.description:
ATK Mohun Bagan pulled off a stunning comeback, beating Kerala Blasters 3-2 at the Fatorda Stadium. Gary Hooper's first-half screamer and Costa Nhamoinesu 51st minute goal put Kibu Vicuna's side in firm control of the contest. But ATKMB's new signing Marcelinho, reignited hope with a debut goal and Roy Krishna's brace helped complete a comeback and seal a famous win for Antonio Lopez Habas' side!

What was your favourite moment from #ATKMBKBFC? Let us know in the comments below 👇 

#HeroISL #LetsFootball

Follow all the match highlights & updates on our official YouTube channel. Like, Comment and Subscribe and make sure to click on the bell icon.

snippet.title: നാളെ  2021 ഫെബ്രുവരി 3 പൊതുജനങ്ങൾ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കുക 7 പ്രധാന അറിയിപ്പുകൾ
snippet.description:
നാളെ  2021 ഫെബ്രുവരി 3 പൊതുജനങ്ങൾ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കുക 7 പ്രധാന അറിയിപ്പുകൾ 
𝐃𝐢𝐬𝐜𝐥𝐚𝐢𝐦𝐞𝐫📢📢📢
ഈ ചാനലിലൂടെ ഞങ്ങൾ  പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന വീഡിയോകളിൽ ഒരുതരത്തിലുമുള്ള രാഷ്ട്രീയ,സാമുദായിക, മതപരമായ  ഒരു വേർതിരിവുമില്ല. ഗവൺമെന്റ് സ്കീമുകൾ ഏത് നിമിഷവും എപ്പോൾ വേണമെങ്കിലും മാറ്റം സംഭവിക്കാം . ആയതിനാൽ ഞങ്ങൾ പ്രസിദ്ധീകരിക്കുന്ന പുതിയ വീഡിയോ അപ്‌ഡേഷനുകൾ കാണുവാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക👍.

snippet.description:

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! ❤️

snippet.title: Budget 2021 HIGHLIGHTS - The key Take Away -  CNN News18
snippet.description:
Watch the key highlights of Budget 2021 presented by the FM Nirmala Sitharaman.

Budget 2021 Highlights:

Contingency Fund of India to be enhanced to Rs 30,000 cr.

Propose to discontinue loans to FCI. Have provided for support in budget.

15th Finance Commission reconfirming share of States at 41%.

National Research Foundation to be set up at Rs. 50,000 crores to strengthen the research ecosystem

Union Budget 2021 allows NRIs to operate OPCs in India

#CNNNews18 #Budget2021 #BudgetWithNews18 

Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman presents the Union Budget 2021 in Parliament. Sitharaman has raised hopes, going into the Budget event, by stating that it will "be a Budget like never before."

Watch all the latest updates on Union Budget 2021 LIVE: FM Nirmala Sitharaman to present budget at 11 AM.

snippet.title: New Tata Safari 2021 with 6/7 Seat configuration | Diesel Manual & Automatic | Review by Baiju Nair
snippet.description:
All new Tata Safari 2021 with 6/7 Seat configuration | Diesel Manual & Automatic | Malayalam Review by Baiju N Nair

തുടക്കത്തിൽ പറഞ്ഞ സ്പെയർ പാർട്സുകൾ ഓൺലൈൻ വാങ്ങാവുന്ന കമ്പനിയുടെ വിശദ വിവരങ്ങൾ ഇതാ:
 https://boodmo.com
ആപ്പിൾ സ്റ്റോർ: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/boodmo/id1154010647
ഗൂഗിൾ പ്ളേസ്റ്റോർ: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.opsway.boodmo
 
ടാറ്റ ഹാരിയറിന്റെ 6-7 സീറ്റർ മോഡൽ സഫാരി എന്ന പേരിൽ എത്തുകയാണ്.പേര് അങ്ങനെയാണെങ്കിലും പഴയ സഫാരിയുമായി പുലബന്ധം പോലുമില്ല പുതിയതിന്.ഹാരിയറിൽ 3 നിര സീറ്റുകൾ വന്നെന്നു മാത്രം.

Follow me on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/baijunnairofficial
Instagram:www.instagram.com/baijunnair 
Email:baijunnair@gmail.com  
വാർത്തകൾക്കും ടെസ്റ്റ് ഡ്രൈവ് റിപ്പോർട്ടുകൾക്കുമായി ഞങ്ങളുടെ വെബ്‌സൈറ്റ് സന്ദർശിക്കാം: http://www.smartdrivemag.com 

#BaijuNNair #AutoVlogMalayalam #TataSafariMalayalam #DieselAutomatic #6SeaterHarrier #7SeaterHarrier #LuxurySUV

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1164 & 1165 | Recap
snippet.description:
Heer tries her best to carry out her responsibilities in Biji's house and take care of the baby. However, Heer's truth about earning money by making deity figurines is out to Biji's family. Will Heer be forgiven or punished?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Chithi 2 & Thirumagal Mahasangamam - Full Episode | Part - 1 | 31 Jan 2021 | Sun TV | Tamil Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Special Episode of Chithi 2 & Thirumagal Mahasangamam, that airs on Sun TV.

#RadikaaSarathkumar #SunTV #Chithi2 #Thirumagal #Chithi2ThirumagalMahasangamam #TamilSerial #Chithi2Serial #Fullepisode #VenbaKavin #KavinVenba #Mahasangamam #Anjali #Raja #RajaAnjali

Chithi 2, is a whole new story., about yet another ‘Chithi’, our kind-hearted and brave-spirited Saradha. Her portrayal of love, forgiveness, sacrifice, fierceness, and perseverance towards her family, through the thick and thin of life, makes one believe in the power of family. Watch and travel along with Saradha’s offbeat family. 

Anjali, a young, bold and daring girl runs a food on wheels with her father while the Raja who belongs to a rich Zamindar family falls in love with Anjali. She questions anyone who wrongs and is always at loggerheads with the Raja’s mother Aishwarya. Anjali challenges Aishwarya that she would marry her son Raja and would become the daughter-in-law of the house.

Kanyadaan: Synopsis : Kanyadan is a story of a father Anjan Basu - a History teacher and his five daughters. After his wife’s demise, Anjan Basu had always been the guiding light & the support system to his daughters’ life, which paved its way even after they got married. He has always guarded his daughters with all his principles & ideals, through all the complexities of life and lead them with love to get them through and survive. The story revolves around the lives of these characters and their journey.

snippet.title: Starship SN9 Flight Test
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN9 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible between 9 am and 6 pm Central time on Tuesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

Updates: https://forum.nasaspaceflight.com/index.php?topic=52398.280

Articles: https://www.nasaspaceflight.com/tag/starship/

Shop: https://www.nasaspaceflight.com/shop/

snippet.title: BJP का साथ छोड़ Ghazipur Border पर किसानों के समर्थन में जुटे लोग
snippet.description:
Farmers Protest: किसान आंदोलन से जुड़ी एक खबर आ रही है कि कुछ लोग बीजेपी का साथ छोड़कर किसानों के समर्थन में गाजीपुर बॉर्डर पहुंचे हैं. इस दौरान NDTV से दो लोगों ने बातचीत किया जो यूपी से बीजेपी का साथ छोड़कर किसानों के समर्थन में आए हुए हैं. उनका कहना था कि बीजेपी जो ‘जय जवान, जय किसान’ का नारा देती है, आज उन्हीं जय किसानों को वो द्रेशद्रोही कह रही है. यह सबसे शर्मनाक घटना है. इसके साथ ही लोकतंत्र में उन्हें गणतंत्र दिवस न मनाने देना ये भी बहुत शर्म की बात है. इसलिए हमने 19 जनवरी को भारतीय जनता पार्टी को छोड़ने का निर्णय लिया. उन्होंने कहा कि इसलिए हम लोग किसानों के समर्थन में यहां आए हैं. हम किसानों के साथ हैं.

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

देखें NDTV इंडिया लाइव, फ़्री डिश पर चैनल नं 49

चैनल सब्सक्राइब करें : https://www.youtube.com/user/ndtvindia?sub_confirmation=1
हमारे फेसबुक पेज को लाइक करें : https://www.facebook.com/NDTVIndia
हमें ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें : https://twitter.com/ndtvindia
NDTV Apps डाउनलोड करें : http://www.ndtv.com/page/apps
अन्य वीडियो देखें : https://khabar.ndtv.com/videos
हमें इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें : https://www.instagram.com/ndtvindia/

फ़ूड वीडियो के लिए NDTV ज़ायका सब्सक्राइब करें :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8affpNLjC7-EhiAeTuGZ6g/?guided_help_flow=5

हेल्थ वीडियो के लिए NDTV सेहत वेहत सब्सक्राइब करें :
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBtSjjjxahfjdZTZiLKXkhw?view_as=subscriber

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, we’re going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now let’s head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You don’t need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle — you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 — Perfectly round crepes
2:02 — No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 — Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 — DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 — A way to cut package tape 
8:12 — DIY compass using three pencils

localized.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
localized.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, we’re going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now let’s head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You don’t need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle — you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 — Perfectly round crepes
2:02 — No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 — Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 — DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 — A way to cut package tape 
8:12 — DIY compass using three pencils

snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/sundar-brings-daya-s-letter-1000106668?watch=true

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3093: Jethalal Received Daya's letter
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sundar has come to Jethalal's place to give them the good news. Jethalal, Champaklal, and Tapu think it's about Daya coming back but that good news is about Sundar's new business. Everyone in the Gada family is missing Daya so Sundar gives them a letter of Daya. Tapu gets emotional after getting the letter. catch the fun and watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.description:
Des Ki Baat - February 2, 2021: केंद्र के कृषि कानूनों (Farm Laws) के खिलाफ चल रहे आंदोलन को किसान संगठन और तेज करने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं. लाल किले (Red Fort) पर हुई घटना को देखते हुए पुलिस ने दिल्ली की सीमाओं पर प्रदर्शन स्थलों को किले में तब्दील कर दिया. जवानों की तैनाती बढ़ाने के साथ-साथ बेरिकेड की संख्या भी बढ़ा दी गई है. प्रदर्शन स्थलों और उसके आसपास के इलाकों में इंटरनेट बैन कर दिया गया है. लोगों को पैदल चलने से रोकने के लिए कंटीले तार लगाए गए हैं. गाड़ियों की हवा निकालने के लिए टिकरी बॉर्डर (Tikri Border) पर नुकीली कीलें लगाई गई हैं. पुलिस की कोशिश है कि आंदोलनकारी किसान किसी भी तरह दिल्ली (Delhi) में न घुस आएं. हालांकि पुलिस अपने इस कोशिश में कामयाब होते दिख रही है. लेकिन पुलिस के इस कदम से आम लोगों को काफी दिक्कतें हो रही हैं.

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

देखें NDTV इंडिया लाइव, फ़्री डिश पर चैनल नं 49

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Tuesday, February 2, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 9 (SN9) – the second high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee – approximately 10 km in altitude. SN9 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship’s attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN9’s Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX’s second high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Jetha Says 'I Love You' to Babita?! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता - Ep 3092
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta

snippet.title: PM Modi's Mann Ki Baat with the Nation, January 2021
snippet.description:
During Mann Ki Baat, Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke on a wide range of subjects. PM Modi highlighted India's largest covid vaccination programme and said that it was a symbol of the country's self-reliance. Speaking about road safety, PM Modi said that many efforts were being made for road safety at the individual and collective level. He also condemned the violence that took place on 26th January in Delhi.

snippet.title: Farmers Protest: किसानों को रोकने के लिए किलेबंदी, लगाए गए कंटीले तार | Good Morning India
snippet.description:
Farmers Protest:  केंद्र के कृषि कानूनों के खिलाफ चल रहे आंदोलन को किसान संगठन और तेज करने की तैयारी कर रहे हैं. प्रदर्शन को देखते हुए पुलिस ने दिल्ली की सीमाओं पर प्रदर्शन स्थलों को किले में तब्दील कर दिया. जवानों की तैनाती बढ़ाने के साथ-साथ बेरिकेड की संख्या भी बढ़ा दी गई है. प्रदर्शन स्थलों और उसके आसपास के इलाकों में इंटरनेट बैन कर दिया गया है. लोगों को पैदल चलने से रोकने के लिए कंटीले तार लगाए गए हैं. इस बीच, किसान यूनियनों ने 6 फरवरी को ‘चक्का जाम' करने की घोषणा की है. 

NDTV India is a 24-hour Hindi news channel. NDTV India established its image as one of India's leading credible news channels, and is a preferred channel by an audience which favours high quality programming and news, rather than sensational infotainment.  

NDTV India's popular shows revolve around: news, politics, economy, sports, panel discussions with eminent personalities and noteworthy commentaries.

NDTV इंडिया भारत का सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय हिंदी न्यूज़ चैनल है. NDTV इंडिया पर आप पॉलिटिक्स, बिजनेस, स्पोर्ट्स और बॉलीवुड से जुड़ी ताज़ा ख़बरें देख सकते हैं. सबसे निष्पक्ष और विश्वसनीय लाइव ख़बरों के लिए हमारे साथ बने रहें.

देखें NDTV इंडिया लाइव, फ़्री डिश पर चैनल नं 49

चैनल सब्सक्राइब करें : https://www.youtube.com/user/ndtvindia?sub_confirmation=1
हमारे फेसबुक पेज को लाइक करें : https://www.facebook.com/NDTVIndia
हमें ट्विटर पर फॉलो करें : https://twitter.com/ndtvindia
NDTV Apps डाउनलोड करें : http://www.ndtv.com/page/apps

हमें इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें : https://www.instagram.com/ndtvindia/

snippet.title: Ooruku Puthusu Alaparaigal #Nakkalites
snippet.description:
Looking for Your Second Home in a new city? Look no more! 🏠

Discover world class residences for students and working professionals at @stanzaliving 

Pre-book here: https://bit.ly/3nZnfKB
Or call on (080)46007395 to reserve your spot today!
_
Nothing like your average PG or hostel, explore their residences in these areas:

Chennai - OMR (Padur) | Poonamallee | Urapakkam
Coimbatore - Avinashi Road | Gandhipuram | Saravanampatti

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Nakkalites presents you a New video "Ooruku Puthusu Alaparaigal" Annae antha singanallaur bus yenga nae eruku...!!?..🤣🤣

How difficult is it to leave your family and stay to study in another city or state? How does it feel about leaving home for the first time? 

Watch Nakkalites new video “Ooruku Puthusu Alaparaigal” on Nakkalites Youtube channel.

Nakkalites latest is about a boy who does not want to leave his family and home. But, he has to go to  Singanallaur to build his career.

Find out the challenges the boy faces until he reaches Singanallaur in this Tamil comedy.

Also, watch the full video to see the transformation in the boy.

#OorukuPuthusuAlaparaigal #Comedy #Nakkalites

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Vishnu Priyan

Dilip Kumar

snippet.title: Farmers Protest : Deep Sidhu ने जारी किया नया वीडियो,Sunny Deol पर लगाए आरोप | वनइंडिया हिंदी
snippet.description:
A new video has surfaced of Punjabi actor Deep Sidhu, who has come under attack for the violence at the farmers' tractor rally on Republic Day and the waving of a religious flag at the Red Fort. Area MP Sunny Deol has been accused of cheating people. In this video, Deep Sidhu has accused Sunny Deol of cheating people. He has said that Sunny Deol has cheated people.

गणतंत्र दिवस के दिन किसानों की ट्रैक्टर रैली  में हुई हिंसा और लाल किले पर एक धार्मिक ध्वज लहराए जाने को लेकर आरोपों के घेरे में आए पंजाबी एक्टर दीप सिद्धू का एक नया वीडियो सामने आया है।दीप सिद्धू ने फेसबुक लाइव के जरिए अभिनेता और गुरदासपुर लोकसभा क्षेत्र के सांसद सनी देओल पर लोगों को धोखा देने का आरोप लगाया है.इस वीडियो में दीप सिद्धू ने सनी देओल पर लोगों को धोखा देने का आरोप लगाया है. उन्होंने कहा है कि सनी देओल ने लोगों को धोखा दिया है. 

#FarmersProtest #DeepSidhu 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Subscribe to OneIndia Hindi Channel for the latest updates on Politics, Sports, Entertainment and related videos...

Oneindia Hindi: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOjgc1p2hJ4GZi6pQQoXWYQ

snippet.title: Vallamai Tharayo | EP 72 | YouTube Exclusive | Digital Daily Series | 02-02-2021
snippet.description:
Co-presented by ITC Aashirvaad Superior MP Atta Vallamai Tharayo -https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list... 
Try Abhirami’s delicious and easy-to-make Chocolate Cake recipe now using ITC Aashirvaad Atta. Check the recipe here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lZWq6ae1Oqs&t=4s
விகடன் டெலிவிஸ்டாஸ் மற்றும் மோஷன் கன்டென்ட் குரூப் நிறுவனங்கள் இணைந்து தயாரிக்கும் இந்தியாவின் முதல் யூடியூப் டெய்லி சீரிஸ் `வல்லமை தாராயோ’. திங்கள் முதல் வெள்ளிவரை இரவு 7.00 மணிக்கு யூடியூபில் (https://goo.gl/QiBz7h) மட்டும் ஒளிபரப்பாகத் தொடங்கியிருக்கும் இந்த சீரிஸ் ஒரு பெண்ணின் வாழ்க்கையையும், அவளின் உணர்வுகளையும் மையப் படுத்தியது. Presenting the latest episode of #VallamaiTharayo - India's 1st #DailyDigitalSeries on #YouTube from the house of Vikatan Televistas & Motion Content Group. #VikatanDigitalDaily #YouTubePremiumDaily 

Story & Screenplay by 'Kolangal' V. Thiruselvam, directed by Chidambaram Manivannan, starring Shali Nivekas, VJ Parvathy, Vivek Rajagopal, Kaushick, Saranya Ravichandran and R S Shivaji with a host of others, this series runs Monday to Friday, 7 PM only on YouTube. Subscribe to our channel to stay tuned.

Director  Chidambaram Manivannan
Story & Screenplay  ‘Kolangal’ V. Thiruselvam
Additional Screenplay Veki Amirtharaj
Cinematographer Sathya Venkataraman
Music Director K.C. Balasarangan
Editor Chandru.B
Art Director Vasu Dhevan
Sound Design K Dileep
Dialogues Paari Ayyasami
Additional Dialogues Rajkamal Bharathi
Lyricist Aravind Kumar
Colourist Karthick Chandrasekar
Designer Pradeep Raj
Subtitles  Dhi Subtitles

Vikatan and Motion Content Group, in association with YouTube, present a Digital Daily, exclusively on YouTube. Please show some love to 'Vallamai Tharayo' (trans. Give me the strength). Vikatan's first 'Digital Only' outing, a daily that shall not be on TV but only on YouTube.  This offering from Vikatan that shall join #VikatanPrimeTime in the company of Alaigal, Kolangal, Thirumathi Selvam, Thendral, Azhagi and the currently running show on SUN TV - Naayagi.
Around 22 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been more than 2 decades of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas#FromTheHouseOfVikatanAndMotionContentGroup #Vikatan #DigitalDailySeries

Vikatan's first 'Digital Only' outing, a daily that shall not be on TV but only on YouTube.  This offering from Vikatan that shall join #VikatanPrimeTime in the company of Alaigal, Kolangal, Thirumathi Selvam, Thendral, Azhagi and the currently running show on SUN TV - Naayagi.
Around 22 years back, in the first week of November 1998, Vikatan Televistas started their journey with a weekly serial Akshaya on SUN TV, every Thursday at 9 pm. It has been more than 2 decades of entertaining you - our audience. We thank you for your support, love and criticism all these years. #20YearsOfVikatanTelevistas#FromTheHouseOfVikatanAndMotionContentGroup #Vikatan #DigitalDailySeries

snippet.title: ബിഗ്‌ബോസ് മൂന്നാം സീസണ്‍ 14 മുതല്‍; മത്സരാര്‍ത്ഥികളുടെ പട്ടിക ഇങ്ങനെ l bigg boss malayalam season 3
snippet.description:
ഏഷ്യാനെറ്റ് ബിഗ് ബോസ് മൂന്നാം സീസൺ ഫെബ്രുവരി 3ാം ആഴ്ച തുടക്കമാകും. മലയാളം റിയാലിറ്റി ഷോകൾക്ക് പുതിയ മാനം നൽകിയ ബിഗ്ബോസ് മലയാളത്തിലെ മൂന്നാം സീസൺ ഫെബ്രുവരി പകുതിയോടെ സംരക്ഷണം ചെയ്യുമെന്ന് നേരത്തെ തന്നെ അറിയിപ്പുകൾ ഉണ്ടായിരുന്നു. മൂന്നാം പതിപ്പ് കൊച്ചിയിൽ ചിത്രീകരിക്കാനായിരുന്നു ആലോചന, എന്നാൽ കോവിഡ് പ്രതിസന്ധി കാരണം ചെന്നൈയിൽ തന്നെ നടക്കും എന്നാണ് ഇപ്പോൾ അറിയാൻ കഴിഞ്ഞിരിക്കുന്നത്. തമിഴ് ബിഗ് ബോസ്സിൻ്റെ സെറ്റിൽ തന്നെയാകും മലയാളവും ഷൂട്ട് ചെയ്യുക. ആറാട്ട് എന്ന ചിത്രത്തിലെ ചിത്രീകരണം പൂർത്തിയാക്കിയ ഉടൻ മോഹൻലാൽ ബിഗ് ബോസ് സെറ്റിൽ എത്തും എന്നാണ് അറിയാൻ കഴിഞ്ഞത്.

#BiggBossSeason #ArchanaKavi #govindpadmasoorya #Season3 #Mohanlal #BiggBossMalayalam #Arya #Rajithkumar #BobyChemmanur  #KaniKusruti #AnarkaliMarikar #rjmathukutty #anukaniyan

snippet.title: How to Survive School! School Hacks and Cheats. Ways to SNEAK food into class. PRANKS and SPY tips.
snippet.description:
School ideas, cheats, and hacks you should try in class. 

School is one of the most fun experiences we’ve had as teenagers. Even though we had our ups and downs, it’s something unforgettable, and today we wanted to share some wise advice and tricks we all did in class to inspire you. Do you want to sneak some chocolate bars in class? You can wear a few tape rolls around your hand and then stick the chocolate bars on them. Then you need some bandages to cover them — this will make it look like you’ve broken your arm, and nobody will be able to tell. If you need to cheat on a test, stick one of your AirPods to your wrist, call your friend and ask them to read you all the answers you need. Watch until the end to discover some epic pranks you can play on your friends. — I guarantee they’re hilarious. 

Timestamps: 

0:59 — How to cheat on a test 

4:06 — The skittles necklace 

5:57 — Brilliant test cheating trick 

6:55 — Sneak food in class 

8:19 — Sending secret messages

Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

snippet.title: Halla Bol LIVE डिबेट Anjana Om Kashyap के साथ  | Farm Laws | Farmers Protest | Aaj Tak Debate
snippet.description:
Farmers ने 6 February को चक्का जाम का एलान किया है. आज इस मुद्दे पर संसद में भी हंगामे के आसार है. दो महीने से ज्यादा बीत चुके हैं लेकिन Farmer Protest हर दिन नए रंग जोड़ रहा है. आंदोलन के तीन केंद्र- गाजीपुर बॉर्डर, सिंघु बॉर्डर और टिकरी बॉर्डर (Ghazipur border, Singhu border and Tikari border) से चाक चौबंद सुरक्षा की तस्वीरें सामने आई हैं. नुकीली कीलें बिछाई गई हैं तो कंटीले तारों की बाड़ भी लगाई गई है. इससे पहले तक सिर्फ लोहे और सीमेंट की बैरिकेडिंग हुआ करती थी. दिल्ली पुलिस के साथ अर्धसैनिक बल का दस्ता भी बड़ी संख्या में तैनात है. बॉर्डर छावनी में तब्दील हो गए हैं. सुरक्षा को लेकर सारी कवायद 26 जनवरी जैसे बवाल को टालने के लिए है.

#Rajyasabha #UPGhazipur #GajipurBorder #LalQuila #RedFort #FarmerLeaders #FarmersTractorRally #TractorParade #DelhiPolice #DelhiViolence #BJP #Congress #PunjabFarmers

Farmers Protest | Narendra Tomar | Kisaan Andolan | Kisan Andolan | PM Modi | Delhi Border | Amit Shah | Rakesh Tikait
आजतक के साथ देखिये देश-विदेश की सभी महत्वपूर्ण और बड़ी खबरें | Watch the latest Hindi news Live on the World's Most Subscribed News Channel on YouTube.
